zh.lifeSummary: 當John Kennedy 1st of Blairquhan於大約1382年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾馬波爾時，他的父親Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure35歲，母親Agnes Maxwell25歲。他和Mrs John Kennedy I至少有1個兒子。他去世於1473年6月12日享年92歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Kennedy 1st of Blairquhan于大约1382年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾馬波爾时，他的父亲Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure35岁，母亲Agnes Maxwell25岁。他和Mrs John Kennedy I至少有1个儿子。他去世于1473年6月12日享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

en.lifeSummary: When John Kennedy 1st of Blairquhan was born about 1382, in Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure, was 35 and his mother, Agnes Maxwell, was 25. He had at least 1 son with Mrs John Kennedy I. He died on 12 June 1473, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Kennedy 1st of Blairquhan est né environ 1382, à Maybole, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Agnes Maxwell, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs John Kennedy I. Il est décédé le 12 juin 1473, à l’âge de 92 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Kennedy 1st of Blairquhan um 1382 in Maybole, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure 35 und seine Mutter Agnes Maxwell 25. Er hatte mit Mrs John Kennedy I mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 12. Juni 1473 im Alter von 92 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Kennedy 1st of Blairquhan è nato il circa 1382 nel Maybole, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Maxwell, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs John Kennedy I. Morì il 12 giugno 1473, all'età di 92 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Kennedy 1st of Blairquhan(이)가 대략 1382년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 메이볼일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Maxwell(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Mrs John Kennedy I(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1473년 6월 12일 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs John Kennedy I. Ele faleceu em 12 de junho de 1473, com 92 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Kennedy 1st of Blairquhan родился около 1382 г. в местности меибол, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Maxwell, 25. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs John Kennedy I. Он умер 12 июня 1473 г. в возрасте 92 лет.
